title: Cuboid
description: Cuboid: A polyhedron. Standard cuboid consisting of six right-angled quadrilateral faces.

Length.description: Dimension in the local x-axis. The Cuboid will have one face at a distance of Length/2 from the centre along the positive local x-axis and, one face at a distance of Length/2 from the centre along the negative local x-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Depth.description: Dimension in the local y-axis. The Cuboid will have one face at a distance of Depth/2 from the centre along the positive local y-axis and, one face at a distance of Depth/2 from the centre along the negative local y-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Height.description: Dimension in the local z-axis. The Cuboid will have one face at a distance of Height/2 from the centre along the positive local z-axis and, one face at a distance of Height/2 from the centre along the negative local z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
